rulings.Case Title: IN RE: IN THE MATTER OF GBP6, L.P.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday February 14, 2019 line 1. RESPONDENT VINCENZP SIGNORETTI Mtn To Vacate Judgmnt DENIED. Defendant's papers do not include a notice of motion or points and authorities. It is unclear what legal authority Defendant relies on for the motion. Defendant does not meet all of the requirements of CCP 473(b), CCP 473(d) or CCP 473.5. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission, Set One And Request For Sanctions

PLAINTIFF JONATHAN MANHAN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission, Set One And Request For Sanctions continued to February 28, 2019. Defendant shall file and serve opposition no later than February 26, 2019. Plaintiff may file a written reply no later than February 27, 2019 by noon. rulings.Case Title: EVA NUNEZ VS. GREENPOINT MORTGAGE FUNDING, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-18-663120 WITH CASE CGC-19-572968
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday February 14, 2019 line 8. PLAINTIFF EVA NUNEZ MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-18-663120 WITH CASE CGC-19-572968 DENIED. Judgment has been entered in action CUD-18-663120 on December 20, 2018. It also appears from the Registered of Actions that the judgment might have been satisfied. Moving party presents no evidence that the action is "pending" within the meaning of CCP 1048(a). Further, Notice of Motion fails for comply with CRC 3.350. Finally, while Plaintiff claims that she filed an answer in the UD action (Points and Authorities 10:21), no such filed answer is attached of could be located in the file.= (501/CFH)
